questionHtml:
Star X has a luminosity L and an apparent brightness b. Star X is at a distance d from Earth.

Star Y has the same apparent brightness as X but is four times more luminous.

What is the distance of Star Y from Earth?


A.  4d

B.  2d

C.  d2

D.  d4

meta.title: Star X has a luminosity L and an apparent brightness b. Star X is at a distance d from Earth. Star Y has the same apparent brightness as X but is four times more luminous. What is
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
B. The particulate nature of matter
